patch.value: Drift-lock the .agents/plugins/marketplace.json (pm-local) manifest in the plugin contract test

The repo has three marketplace manifests; the drift test reconciles only root marketplace.json and .claude-plugin/marketplace.json. The third, .agents/plugins/marketplace.json (name pm-local), has no test/code/docs reference and can silently rot (it currently lists only pm-codex and omits pm-claude, with no enforced version).

tests/integration/claude-plugin-contract.spec.ts (or scripts/smoke-claude-plugin.mjs) reads .agents/plugins/marketplace.json and asserts its plugin list and version stay consistent with plugins/*/.codex-plugin/plugin.json and plugins/*/.claude-plugin/plugin.json; CI fails if the manifest drifts.
